title: How can I get an account on a Testing Environment?
bodyHtml:
Our testing environment is available for all our sellers and is an exact duplicate of our Back Market's portal for Sellers, the only difference is the database associated. So the Catalog and Unique ID will not be the same as the real environment.

You can get your account created here and click on 'Register as a seller - EU'.

Then, fill the different fields of the pages. The values do not matter much - it just needs to respect our format requirements. 



Once you've filled all the fields, email us, and we'll get it activated in less than 24 hours.
